description: Explore the 'Renewable Energy' activity in GCompris to document it for a lesson plan. Power the town by activating the Solar, Wind, and Hydro energy sources. Save a screenshot of the powered town to /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_screenshot.png. Additionally, create a lesson note at /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_lesson_note.txt including the activity name, a 2-3 sentence summary of the learning objectives, the energy sources utilized, and a discussion question for students.
